reviews.review_description: I like to try games if they are fun I keep them this game is not bad the only part i like about it is the buttons and lights low key it would be a cool game if they added more levels and an actual pov inside the plane and use the other screens but if you like planes or kinda war thunder this might be a game for you I did not really like it honestly just play gtag or smthn I would rather get like Pavlov or tabor just me personally get a different game not trying to hate on anything but just make it a little more realistic or interesting 🤨

Can’t fix my seat position when I start the game, I am too high up in the chair to reach down. Even after I reset my floor position… Maybe a reset feature through a pause menu? 

Other than that, the game has soo much potential as it’s the only one of its kind so far for quest. I hope to see updates soon!!!

I love the gameplay however my only complaint would be the flares. I haven’t figured out how to use them to avoid missiles. If the game gets the features it promised in future updates it’ll be amazing!
